articles.description: Arvid Lindblad tells BBC Sport about being shaped by his Indian and Swedish heritage and how he was fixated on reaching F1 from aged five.
articles.title: Arvid Lindblad: Britain's youngest ever F1 driver on his Indian and Swedish heritage and reaching F1 aged 18

articles.description: The driver of the car involved in a fatal crash involving British heavyweight boxer Anthony Joshua has appeared in court in Nigeria.
articles.title: Anthony Joshua: Case against driver in fatal crash adjourned until March

articles.description: Gianni Infantino has clashed with players' unions and European football, but remains in an impregnable position at Fifa.
articles.title: Gianni Infantino - 10 years as Fifa president

articles.description: After a long time in the wilderness, Zimbabwe are again contending on the biggest stage at the 2026 T20 World Cup - this is the story of their resurgence.
articles.title: T20 World Cup: Zimbabwe's battle back from wilderness to impressing on the biggest stage again

articles.description: US government officials are warned that there could be "catastrophic" security consequences if cities hosting World Cup matches do not receive funding that has been frozen.
articles.title: World Cup 2026: US cities' security concerns over funding freeze

articles.description: Bodo/Glimt knock out last year's finalists Inter Milan in one of the biggest upsets in Champions League history and now the team from the Arctic Circle is dreaming of how far they can go after reaching last 16.
articles.title: Bodo/Glimt: 'Historical moment' as Norwegian side reach last 16 against all odds

articles.description: Rookie Kon Knueppel becomes the fastest player to reach 200 three-pointers in NBA history as the Charlotte Hornets defeat the Chicago Bulls 131-99.
articles.title: NBA: Charlotte Hornets' Kon Knueppel races to NBA three-pointer record

articles.description: Italian clubs are on brink of a historic Champions League embarrassment, with the prospect of none making the last 16.
articles.title: Italian clubs on brink of historic Champions League embarrassment

articles.description: The Lionesses will host Ukraine in their Women's World Cup qualifier at the Hill Dickinson Stadium in June.
articles.title: Lionesses to host Ukraine at Everton's Hill Dickinson Stadium

articles.description: After an immature winter, Harry Brook's mature and majestic century against Pakistan proved he is England's leader for the future, writes Matthew Henry.
articles.title: T20 World Cup: Harry Brook shows he is England's leader for the future
